n: A Tour of the Farmers Faire

steps.t: Mayor Whitfoot can be found in the centre of Bywater during the Farmers Faire festival. You should speak with Mayor Whitfoot.
Fishing in the Shire is most often found at the Fishing Hole just to the north of Bywater. You should head up to the pond to see if fishing is part of…
The Festival Announcer, Caltha Tunnelly, should know of a shortcut to Sandson's Farm. You should speak with Caltha Tunnelly once again.
Wymarc Grubb is at Sandson's Farm in the Shire, just east of Michel and Little Delving. You should speak with Wymarc Grubb about the Egg Scramble even…
Bamfurlong, Farmer Maggot's renowned farm, is in the Marish in the south-eastern corner of the Shire. The Mushroom-thieving takes place there. The far…
Caltha Tunnelly, the Festival Announcer, is at the Farmers Faire in Bywater. You should speak with Caltha Tunnelly to finish the tour of the Farmers F…
